json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: Complete a total of eight courses from the following four areas, including at least one core course in each area:

options.title: Areas
options.description: Only one course of Psychology 135 or Sociology 132 may be applied.

options.title: Interpersonal Communication
options.description: Only one course of Psychology 135 or Sociology 132 may be applied.

options.title: Political and Legal Communication
options.description: Only one course of Political Science 141B or Sociology 133 may be applied.

courses: COMM 155 - Artificial Intelligence and New Media
COMM M176 - Visual Communication and Social Advocacy
COMM 191E - Variable Topics Research Seminars: Practicum
